title: WildCrabs
description: This pack adds more texture variants to crabs from WilderWild mod
body:
**Hi! This texture packs adds more texture variants to crabs from the amazing** [WilderWild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild) **mod**. 

**You can choose between two versions!**
- **In the random version** the crab textures are well..Random!
- **In the normal version (Just WildCrabs)** the textures are based on the biome the crabs spawn in [EntityTextureFeatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) **is required for this version to work!**
  
**ENJOY! :D**

Mangrove fella (**check out the gallery for more fellas!**)
![Mangrove fella (check out the gallery for more fellas!)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d4711097485f50c43267379c33ba8e32d1d4779_0.webp)
